auth.label: API Key
auth.description: Upsales API key sent as the token query parameter. Admin users can manage API keys in Upsales settings; see the official API documentation: https://api.upsales.com/.

actions.name: create_company
actions.description: Create an Upsales company using the official accounts endpoint.

company.description: Upsales company JSON payload using official account fields such as name, phone, webpage, users, or custom.

inputSchema.description: Request parameters for creating an Upsales company.

company.description: Raw Upsales entity fields returned by the API.

actions.name: create_contact
actions.description: Create an Upsales contact using the official contacts endpoint.

contact.description: Upsales contact JSON payload using official contact fields such as firstName, lastName, name, email, phone, title, active, client, or custom.

usingFirstnameLastname.description: Whether Upsales should interpret firstName and lastName fields when creating the contact.

inputSchema.description: Request parameters for creating an Upsales contact.

contact.description: Raw Upsales entity fields returned by the API.

actions.name: delete_company
actions.description: Delete an Upsales company by ID.

inputSchema.description: Request parameters for deleting an Upsales company.

success.description: Whether the delete request completed with a successful HTTP status.

actions.name: delete_contact
actions.description: Delete an Upsales contact by ID.

inputSchema.description: Request parameters for deleting an Upsales contact.

success.description: Whether the delete request completed with a successful HTTP status.

actions.name: get_company
actions.description: Read one Upsales company by ID.

inputSchema.description: Request parameters for reading one Upsales company.

company.description: Raw Upsales entity fields returned by the API.

actions.name: get_contact
actions.description: Read one Upsales contact by ID.

inputSchema.description: Request parameters for reading one Upsales contact.

contact.description: Raw Upsales entity fields returned by the API.

actions.name: get_current_user
actions.description: Read the Upsales user associated with the authenticated API token.

inputSchema.description: No input is required to read the current Upsales user.

user.description: Raw Upsales entity fields returned by the API.

actions.name: get_user
actions.description: Read one Upsales user by ID.

inputSchema.description: Request parameters for reading one Upsales user.

user.description: Raw Upsales entity fields returned by the API.

actions.name: list_companies
actions.description: List Upsales companies with optional pagination and official query filters.

limit.description: Maximum number of records to return, from 1 to 2000.

offset.description: Number of records to skip before returning results.

additionalProperties.description: The filter value to send as an Upsales query parameter.

filters.description: Additional Upsales filter query parameters keyed by official API field name, such as user.id or scoreUpdateDate.

includeExternal.description: Whether to include external companies in the result set.

inputSchema.description: Request parameters for listing Upsales companies.

items.description: Raw Upsales entity fields returned by the API.

companies.description: Upsales companies returned by the API.

actions.name: list_contacts
actions.description: List Upsales contacts with optional pagination and official query filters.

limit.description: Maximum number of records to return, from 1 to 2000.

offset.description: Number of records to skip before returning results.

additionalProperties.description: The filter value to send as an Upsales query parameter.

filters.description: Additional Upsales filter query parameters keyed by official API field name, such as user.id or scoreUpdateDate.

inputSchema.description: Request parameters for listing Upsales contacts.

items.description: Raw Upsales entity fields returned by the API.

contacts.description: Upsales contacts returned by the API.

actions.name: list_users
actions.description: List Upsales users with optional pagination and official query filters.

limit.description: Maximum number of records to return, from 1 to 2000.

offset.description: Number of records to skip before returning results.

additionalProperties.description: The filter value to send as an Upsales query parameter.

filters.description: Additional Upsales filter query parameters keyed by official API field name, such as user.id or scoreUpdateDate.

inputSchema.description: Request parameters for listing Upsales users.

items.description: Raw Upsales entity fields returned by the API.

users.description: Upsales users returned by the API.

actions.name: update_company
actions.description: Update an Upsales company by ID using the official accounts endpoint.

company.description: Upsales company JSON payload using official account fields such as name, phone, webpage, users, or custom.

inputSchema.description: Request parameters for updating an Upsales company.

company.description: Raw Upsales entity fields returned by the API.

actions.name: update_contact
actions.description: Update an Upsales contact by ID using the official contacts endpoint.

contact.description: Upsales contact JSON payload using official contact fields such as firstName, lastName, name, email, phone, title, active, client, or custom.

usingFirstnameLastname.description: Whether Upsales should interpret firstName and lastName fields when updating the contact.

inputSchema.description: Request parameters for updating an Upsales contact.

contact.description: Raw Upsales entity fields returned by the API.
